creator: tcberner@freebsd.org
text:
Moin moin

Thanks for the patch, but please make sure you check your plist changes


That looks wrong to me:
  58   │ -%%SPAMASSASSIN%%lib/evolution/modules/module-spamassass
  61   │ -%%YTNEF%%lib/evolution/modules/module-tnef-attachment.s
  69   │ -%%PST%%lib/evolution/plugins/liborg-gnome-pst-import.so
  77   │ -%%PST%%lib/evolution/plugins/org-gnome-pst-import.eplug


mfg Tobias
